chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1198 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order as to non-prosecuiton of main petition as notices not issued as neither cost has been paid nor copies supplied by learned counsel for petitioner. 07.02.2018. Miss Rehana Siddiqui Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Ali Ahmed Palh Advocate for petitioner. -=-=- Today this petition is fixed for order as to non-prosecution of the petition, as neither cost is paid nor notice has been issued to the respondents. The counsel holding brief on behalf of Mr. Ali Ahmed Palh Advocate for the petitioner submits that she has definite instructions from learned counsel for the petitioner to withdraw this petition. In view of above, this petition stands dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
